raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The Research and Development (R&D) Tax Credit and Net Operating Loss (NOL) deductions for Life Sciences companies in California aim to spur innovation.",
    "California's life sciences ecosystem is supported by a cycle where academic research leads to investment from venture capitalists.",
    "In 2019, venture capitalists invested $6.5 billion into California life sciences businesses, making California a leader in the nation for such investments.",
    "California is considered one of the largest biopharmaceutical innovation hubs in the world.",
    "Biopharmaceutical companies are conducting research and development for treatments and vaccines against COVID-19.",
    "California's research and development tax credit incentivizes biotechnology companies to invest in activities that enhance employment opportunities in science and engineering.",
    "In 2019, California companies entered more than 1,380 medicines into clinical trials for treating various serious conditions.",
    "Investments in medical research by CIRM have generated over $11 billion in new sales revenues and taxes for California.",
    "California's tax incentives contribute to the ability of biotechnology companies to expand their workforce and maintain operations in the state.",
    "The COVID-19 pandemic has highlighted the importance of life sciences in addressing global healthcare challenges."
  ]
}
```
